intent: Let the diet_guard companion app (com.kuhy.diet_guard_app) run during the post-23:00 night curfew so its on-device foreground check could be verified after the crdt_sync client repoint.
scope: Non-goal: no change to the general daytime WHITELIST
changes: Add com.kuhy.diet_guard_app to $NIGHT_WHITELIST (meal-logging health tool, not a scroll trap)

verification.evidence: Deploy complete; app re-enabled (pm list packages -d no longer lists it) and launched to the foreground under the active curfew. Diet Guard capture screen rendered with real food-log data intact (meal slots logged, food-bank autocomplete populated); no crash.

risks: Slightly weakens the night curfew by allowing one more app; mitigated because diet_guard is a meal-logging tool, not a scroll trap
rollback: Remove the com.kuhy.diet_guard_app line from $NIGHT_WHITELIST in config.sh and re-run deploy.sh
Confirm via deploy.sh --list that diet_guard is no longer night-whitelisted
